chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-663 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 5594/2024, 2. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2024. Mr. Aamir Saleem, advocate for petitioner Mr. Faraz Akhtar advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent. = Petitioner is present in person alongwith his counsel. They both submit that if petitioner is given six months’ time to vacate the demised premises, they would not press this petition on merits and will hand over vacant peaceful possession to the respondent. Respondent is present alongwith his counsel, who has filed power on his behalf today. The respondent has reluctantly agreed to this proposal. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed in the terms whereby from today, the petitioner may retain the premises viz. Shop No.2, ground floor Nouman Centre, Sub Plot No.FL-2/B-1, FL-2, Block 5, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi for six months subject to payment of all rents and other dues and then handover its vacant peaceful possession to the respondent without a further notice. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE A.K
